svg.title: Teensy 4.0 pinout, top view, only the pins used by the robot
svg.desc: Teensy 4.0 two-row pinout. I2C on 18/19, encoders on 14/15/11/12, motor LEFT on 1/20/21, motor RIGHT on 5/6/8, debug LED on 13, USB micro-ROS serial. Pin 21 is not PWM-capable. All I/O 3.3V, not 5V tolerant.
svg.text: All I/O is 3.3 V — NOT 5 V tolerant
Never connect 5 V encoder / sensor lines to any pin
